/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/node@20/lib -Wl,@/Users/ektasaini/Desktop/mlx-vulkan/mlx-src/build_vulkan_dbg/_deps/nanobind-src/cmake/darwin-ld-cpython.sym -o ../../core.cpython-314-darwin.so CMakeFiles/core.dir/mlx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/array.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/convert.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/distributed.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/export.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/fast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/fft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/indexing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/load.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/metal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/cuda.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/mlx_func.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/stream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/transforms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/random.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/linalg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/constants.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/trees.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/dummy_ptr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/utils.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,@loader_path/lib libnanobind-static.a ../../libmlx.dylib -framework Accelerate
